_comment: Shipped preset for Qwen Relight with a light-reference image. Variant of qwen-edit-2509-relight.json — adds a 2nd top-level LoadImage (#16) bound to upstream_image:annotated[1] which feeds the Qwen-Edit subgraph's `image2` input. RelightStage's autogrow `images` group should have BOTH the subject (image0) AND a light reference (image1) wired in for this variant to produce a meaningful result. Stage's `_relight_prompt()` auto-switches to 'transfer the lighting from the reference image' phrasing when 2 upstream images are present.
label: Qwen Edit 2509 Relight (with reference)
description: Relight via Qwen-Image-Edit 2509 + Relight LoRA, with a 2nd image as the LIGHTING REFERENCE. Wire your subject into images[0] and a reference photo whose lighting you want to transfer into images[1]. Stage's brightness/color/rim_light widgets still tune the description; the reference image gives the model concrete lighting to copy from.

image.error: Relight needs a subject image — wire one into the stage's image input.
This variant requires a 2nd image as light reference — wire one into the stage's autogrow image slot, or pick the standard 'Qwen Edit 2509 Relight' workflow instead.

value.default: transfer the lighting from the reference image onto the subject, preserving identity, geometry, and details; only change lighting and shadows
